Class Component

java.lang.Object
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
Direct Known Subclasses:
ImageComponent, TextComponent, Trigger
public abstract class Component extends Object
Represents a base GUI component within the GUI framework. Provides rendering, update, and input event methods to be overridden. Provides an addWidget(Widget) method to add child widgets.
See Also:
  • Widget
  • GUI
API Note:
Component instances have to be contained in a Widget object in order to be displayed, as this class does not hold the location of components.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Component()
    Constructs a component with zero dimensions.
    Component(int width, int height)
    Constructs a component with the given width and height.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addWidget(Widget widget)
    Adds the given widget as a child widget of this component.
    Widget
    bottom(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-center point lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    bottomLeft(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-left corner lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    bottomRight(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-right corner lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    center()
    Returns a widget containing this component centered at the center of the screen.
    Widget
    center(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component centered at the given coordinates.
    boolean
    contains(int x, int y)
    Returns whether the given coordinates lie within the boundaries of this component.
    List<Widget>
    getChildWidgets()
    Returns the list of child widgets of this component.
    int
    getHeight()
    Returns the height of this component.
    int
    getOffsetX()
    Returns the rendering offset for this component on the x-axis.
    int
    getOffsetY()
    Returns the rendering offset for this component on the y-axis.
    Widget
    getWidget()
    Returns the widget that contains this component.
    int
    getWidth()
    Returns the width of this component.
    boolean
    isClipped()
    Returns whether the rendering context is clipped to the bounding box when rendering this component.
    void
    keyPressEvent(KeyEvent e)
    Override this method to handle a key pressing event.
    void
    keyReleaseEvent(KeyEvent e)
    Override this method to handle a key releasing event.
    void
    keyTypingEvent(KeyEvent e)
    Override this method to handle a key typing event.
    Widget
    left(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose middle-left point lies at the given coordinates.
    void
    mouseClickEvent(int x, int y, MouseButton mouseButton)
    Override this method to handle a mouse click event.
    void
    mouseDragEvent(int x, int y, MouseButton mouseButton)
    Override this method to handle a mouse drag event.
    void
    mouseMoveEvent(int x, int y)
    Override this method to handle a mouse move event.
    void
    mousePressEvent(int x, int y, MouseButton mouseButton)
    Override this method to handle a mouse press event.
    void
    mouseReleaseEvent(MouseButton mouseButton)
    Override this method to handle a mouse release event.
    void
    mouseWheelEvent(MouseWheelEvent e)
    Override this method to handle a mouse wheel move event.
    void
    render(Graphics2D g)
    Renders this component onto the given graphics context.
    Widget
    right(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose middle-right point lies at the given coordinates.
    void
    setClipped(boolean clipped)
    Sets whether the rendering context is clipped to the bounding box when rendering this component.
    void
    setHeight(int height)
    Sets the height of this component to the given value and updates the bounding box.
    void
    setOffsetX(int offsetX)
    Sets the rendering offset for this component on the x-axis.
    void
    setOffsetY(int offsetY)
    Sets the rendering offset for this component on the y-axis.
    void
    setWidth(int width)
    Sets the width of this component to the given value and updates the bounding box.
    Widget
    top(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose top-center point lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    topLeft(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose top-left corner lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    topRight(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose top-right corner lies at the given coordinates.
    void
    update()
    Updates the internal state of this component.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Component

      public Component(int width, int height)
      Constructs a component with the given width and height.
      Parameters:
      width - the width of the component (in pixels)
      height - the height of the component (in pixels)

    • Component

      public Component()
      Constructs a component with zero dimensions.
      API Note:
      This initializes a placeholder component before its size is explicitly set in the constructor of the class that implements this.

  • Method Details

    • render

      public void render(Graphics2D g)

      Renders this component onto the given graphics context.

      This method is called every frame.

      Override this method to provide the rendering logic.

      Parameters:
      g - the graphics context to render on

    • update

      public void update()

      Updates the internal state of this component.

      This method is called every update.

    • addWidget

      public void addWidget(Widget widget)
      Adds the given widget as a child widget of this component.
      Parameters:
      widget - the widget to be added as a child to this component
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the input widget is null

    • contains

      public boolean contains(int x, int y)
      Returns whether the given coordinates lie within the boundaries of this component.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate
      y - the y-coordinate
      Returns:
      whether the given coordinates lie within the boundaries of this component

    • getWidth

      public int getWidth()
      Returns the width of this component.
      Returns:
      the width of this component (in pixels)

    • getHeight

      public int getHeight()
      Returns the height of this component.
      Returns:
      the height of this component (in pixels)

    • isClipped

      public boolean isClipped()
      Returns whether the rendering context is clipped to the bounding box when rendering this component.
      Returns:
      whether the rendering context is clipped to the bounding box when rendering this component

    • getOffsetX

      public int getOffsetX()
      Returns the rendering offset for this component on the x-axis.
      Returns:
      the rendering offset for this component on the x-axis

    • getOffsetY

      public int getOffsetY()
      Returns the rendering offset for this component on the y-axis.
      Returns:
      the rendering offset for this component on the y-axis

    • getWidget

      public Widget getWidget()
      Returns the widget that contains this component.
      Returns:
      the widget that contains this component

    • getChildWidgets

      public List<Widget> getChildWidgets()
      Returns the list of child widgets of this component.
      Returns:
      the list of child widgets of this component

    • setWidth

      public void setWidth(int width)

      Sets the width of this component to the given value and updates the bounding box.

      If this component is contained in a widget, the position of the widget is updated as well.

      Parameters:
      width - the new width of this component (in pixels)

    • setHeight

      public void setHeight(int height)

      Sets the height of this component to the given value and updates the bounding box.

      If this component is contained in a widget, the position of the widget is updated as well.

      Parameters:
      height - the new height of this component (in pixels)

    • setClipped

      public void setClipped(boolean clipped)
      Sets whether the rendering context is clipped to the bounding box when rendering this component.
      Parameters:
      clipped - whether the rendering context is clipped to the bounding box when rendering this component

    • setOffsetX

      public void setOffsetX(int offsetX)
      Sets the rendering offset for this component on the x-axis.
      Parameters:
      offsetX - the new rendering offset on the x-axis

    • setOffsetY

      public void setOffsetY(int offsetY)
      Sets the rendering offset for this component on the y-axis.
      Parameters:
      offsetY - the new rendering offset on the y-axis

    • mouseClickEvent

      public void mouseClickEvent(int x, int y, MouseButton mouseButton)
      Override this method to handle a mouse click event.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the click
      y - the y-coordinate of the click
      mouseButton - the mouse button that is clicked

    • mousePressEvent

      public void mousePressEvent(int x, int y, MouseButton mouseButton)
      Override this method to handle a mouse press event.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the press
      y - the y-coordinate of the press
      mouseButton - the mouse button that is pressed

    • mouseReleaseEvent

      public void mouseReleaseEvent(MouseButton mouseButton)
      Override this method to handle a mouse release event.
      Parameters:
      mouseButton - the mouse button that is released

    • mouseMoveEvent

      public void mouseMoveEvent(int x, int y)
      Override this method to handle a mouse move event.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the mouse
      y - the y-coordinate of the mouse

    • mouseDragEvent

      public void mouseDragEvent(int x, int y, MouseButton mouseButton)
      Override this method to handle a mouse drag event.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the mouse
      y - the y-coordinate of the mouse
      mouseButton - the mouse button that is dragged

    • mouseWheelEvent

      public void mouseWheelEvent(MouseWheelEvent e)
      Override this method to handle a mouse wheel move event.
      Parameters:
      e - the mouse wheel event

    • keyTypingEvent

      public void keyTypingEvent(KeyEvent e)
      Override this method to handle a key typing event.
      Parameters:
      e - the key event

    • keyPressEvent

      public void keyPressEvent(KeyEvent e)
      Override this method to handle a key pressing event.
      Parameters:
      e - the key event

    • keyReleaseEvent

      public void keyReleaseEvent(KeyEvent e)
      Override this method to handle a key releasing event.
      Parameters:
      e - the key event

    • center

      public Widget center(int x, int y)
      Returns a widget containing this component centered at the given coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate
      y - the y-coordinate
      Returns:
      a new Widget object containing this component

    • left

      public Widget left(int x, int y)
      Returns a widget containing this component whose middle-left point lies at the given coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate
      y - the y-coordinate
      Returns:
      a new Widget object containing this component

      public Widget right(int x, int y)
      Returns a widget containing this component whose middle-right point lies at the given coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate
      y - the y-coordinate
      Returns:
      a new Widget object containing this component

      Returns a widget containing this component whose top-center point lies at the given coordinates.

      x - the x-coordinate
      y - the y-coordinate
      Returns:
      a new Widget object containing this component

      Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-center point lies at the given coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate
      y - the y-coordinate
      Returns:
      a new Widget object containing this component

      Returns a widget containing this component whose top-left corner lies at the given coordinates.

      Returns:
      a new Widget object containing this component

      public Widget topRight(int x, int y)
      Returns a widget containing this component whose top-right corner lies at the given coordinates.

      x - the x-coordinate

      Returns:

      public Widget bottomLeft(int x, int y)
      Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-left corner lies at the given coordinates.
